title: calamagrostis neglecta subsp. inexpansa
intro: Calamagrostis neglecta subsp. inexpansa, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Calamagrostis neglecta subsp. inexpansa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage methods.
